---
title: "Marginal costs summary by subclass"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This notebook provides a summary of bill components by subclass.

After ingest, the diagnostic cell prints the S3 path, column count, full schema, and `head(3)` — enough to confirm paths and hive reads without a full-table row count (which would scan every row).

**Scope:** CAIRO outputs for **run 1+2** only (`comb_bills_year_target` and `cross_subsidization_BAT_values`).

## Parameters and paths

```{python}
#| label: params-paths

from __future__ import annotations

import polars as pl
from great_tables import GT

# Match `notebooks/analysis.qmd` — change these when you switch runs.
STATE = "RI"
BATCH = "ri_20260323_r1-16"

_state_lower = STATE.lower()
S3_BASE = "s3://data.sb/switchbox/cairo/outputs/hp_rates"
PATH_MASTER_BILLS_12 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_1+2/comb_bills_year_target/"
PATH_MASTER_BAT_12 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_1+2/cross_subsidization_BAT_values/"
PATH_MASTER_BILLS_34 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_3+4/comb_bills_year_target/"
PATH_MASTER_BAT_34 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_3+4/cross_subsidization_BAT_values/"

PATH_METADATA_UP_02 = f"s3://data.sb/nrel/resstock/res_2024_amy2018_2_sb/metadata/state=RI/upgrade=02/metadata-sb.parquet"

S3_OPTS: dict[str, str] = {"aws_region": "us-west-2"}

metadata_up_02 = pl.scan_parquet(PATH_METADATA_UP_02, storage_options=S3_OPTS)
metadata_up_02_df = metadata_up_02.collect()
metadata_up_02_hp_df = metadata_up_02_df.filter(pl.col("postprocess_group.has_hp"))
```



## BAT values — run 1+2 (lazy)

```{python}
#| label: ingest-bat-12

bat_12 = pl.scan_parquet(PATH_MASTER_BAT_12, hive_partitioning=True, storage_options=S3_OPTS)
bat_34 = pl.scan_parquet(PATH_MASTER_BAT_34, hive_partitioning=True, storage_options=S3_OPTS)
```

```{python}
#| label: diagnostic-bat-12

HEATING_TYPE_COL = "postprocess_group.heating_type"
POSTPROCESS_GROUP_HAS_HP = "postprocess_group.has_hp"

# Materialize once: .collect() returns a DataFrame; the lazy frame is unchanged if you don't assign.
bat_12_df = bat_12.collect()
print(bat_12_df.head(3))

# BAT tables use heating_type + fuel flags (see `bat-ingest` in analysis.qmd) — there is no `heats_with_electricity`.
hp_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "heat_pump")
electric_resistance_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "electrical_resistance")
natgas_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col("heats_with_natgas"))
oil_propane_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col("heats_with_oil") | pl.col("heats_with_propane"))

print(f"Total buildings: {bat_12_df.height}")
print(f"Heat pump buildings: {hp_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Electric resistance buildings: {electric_resistance_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Natural gas buildings: {natgas_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Oil/propane buildings: {oil_propane_bldgs.height}")
```

```{python}
#| label: delivery-cos-summary-table

def _weighted_sum(df: pl.DataFrame, col: str, w_col: str = "weight") -> float:
    """Sum of (value × survey weight) — population-scaled total for the sample."""
    if df.is_empty():
        return float("nan")
    return float((df[col] * df[w_col]).sum())


def delivery_cos_weighted_sum(df: pl.DataFrame) -> float:
    """Total (economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery) × weight."""
    x = df.with_columns(
        (pl.col("economic_burden_delivery") + pl.col("residual_share_delivery")).alias("delivery_cos"),
    )
    return _weighted_sum(x, "delivery_cos")


_rows: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    total = delivery_cos_weighted_sum(d)
    _rows.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "total_delivery_cos": round(total, 2),
    })

_delivery_cos_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_rows)
print(
    "\n economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n"
)
print(_delivery_cos_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: annual-bill-delivery-summary-table

_rows_bill: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    total = _weighted_sum(d, "annual_bill_delivery")
    _rows_bill.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "total_annual_bill_delivery": round(total, 2),
    })

_annual_bill_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_rows_bill)
print("\n annual_bill_delivery — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n")
print(_annual_bill_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: bill-minus-cos-diff-table

# Second table minus first: annual_bill_delivery total − delivery COS total (same groups, same order).
_diff_rows: list[dict] = []
for cos_row, bill_row in zip(_rows, _rows_bill, strict=True):
    assert cos_row["group"] == bill_row["group"]
    _diff_rows.append({
        "group": cos_row["group"],
        "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos": round(
            bill_row["total_annual_bill_delivery"] - cos_row["total_delivery_cos"],
            2,
        ),
    })

_diff_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_diff_rows)
print(
    "\n annual_bill_delivery − (economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery) — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n"
)
print(_diff_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: diff-over-cos-ratio-table

# Fourth table: (third ÷ first) × 100 = (diff ÷ total_delivery_cos) as a percent.
_ratio_rows: list[dict] = []
for diff_row, cos_row in zip(_diff_rows, _rows, strict=True):
    assert diff_row["group"] == cos_row["group"]
    denom = cos_row["total_delivery_cos"]
    num = diff_row["diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos"]
    if denom == 0:
        pct = float("nan")
    else:
        pct = round(num / denom * 100, 2)
    _ratio_rows.append({
        "group": diff_row["group"],
        "pct_diff_div_delivery_cos": pct,
    })

_ratio_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_ratio_rows)
print(
    "\n (table 3) ÷ (table 1) = diff ÷ total_delivery_cos — percent (%)\n"
)
print(_ratio_tbl)
```

## Combined summary (Great Tables)

```{python}
#| label: delivery-summary-gt

_merged = (
    pl.DataFrame(_rows)
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_rows_bill), on="group")
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_diff_rows), on="group")
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_ratio_rows), on="group")
    .with_columns(pl.col("pct_diff_div_delivery_cos").fill_nan(None))
)

_delivery_summary_gt = (
    GT(_merged, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Delivery bill vs. delivery cost of service — weighted totals by subgroup",
        subtitle="Run 1+2 BAT outputs; Σ denotes sum of (value × ResStock weight).",
    )
    .tab_spanner(
        label="Σ (value × weight), $/yr",
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
        ],
    )
    .tab_spanner(
        label="Ratio",
        columns=["pct_diff_div_delivery_cos"],
    )
    .cols_label(
        total_delivery_cos="Delivery COS",
        total_annual_bill_delivery="Annual delivery bill",
        diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos="Bill − COS",
        pct_diff_div_delivery_cos="(Bill − COS) ÷ COS",
    )
    .fmt_currency(
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
        ],
        decimals=0,
    )
    .fmt_number(columns="pct_diff_div_delivery_cos", decimals=1, pattern="{x}%")
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(
        align="right",
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
            "pct_diff_div_delivery_cos",
        ],
    )
    .tab_source_note(
        "Delivery COS = economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery. "
        "Annual delivery bill = annual_bill_delivery. "
        "Ratio = (Bill − COS) ÷ delivery COS (×100 as %).",
    )
)

_delivery_summary_gt
```

## Economic burden delivery — mean and median by subgroup

Weighted mean and weighted median (p50) of **`economic_burden_delivery`** ($/yr per building), using ResStock **`weight`**. Same four groups as above.

```{python}
#| label: economic-burden-delivery-mean-median-gt

_EBD_COL = "economic_burden_delivery"


def _w_mean_ebd(df: pl.DataFrame, col: str, w_col: str = "weight") -> float:
    if df.is_empty() or df[w_col].sum() == 0:
        return float("nan")
    return float((df[col] * df[w_col]).sum() / df[w_col].sum())


def _w_median_ebd(df: pl.DataFrame, col: str, w_col: str = "weight") -> float:
    """Weighted median via cumulative survey weight (same approach as `analysis.qmd`)."""
    if df.is_empty() or df[w_col].sum() == 0:
        return float("nan")
    s = df.sort(col)
    cum = s[w_col].cum_sum() / s[w_col].sum()
    return float(s.filter(cum >= 0.5)[col][0])


_ebd_stat_rows: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    _ebd_stat_rows.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "mean_economic_burden_delivery": _w_mean_ebd(d, _EBD_COL),
        "median_economic_burden_delivery": _w_median_ebd(d, _EBD_COL),
    })

_ebd_stats_df = (
    pl.DataFrame(_ebd_stat_rows)
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("mean_economic_burden_delivery").fill_nan(None),
        pl.col("median_economic_burden_delivery").fill_nan(None),
    )
)

_economic_burden_delivery_gt = (
    GT(_ebd_stats_df, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Economic burden (delivery) — mean and median by subgroup",
        subtitle="Weighted with ResStock weights; BAT column economic_burden_delivery ($/yr).",
    )
    .cols_label(
        mean_economic_burden_delivery="Mean",
        median_economic_burden_delivery="Median",
    )
    .fmt_currency(
        columns=["mean_economic_burden_delivery", "median_economic_burden_delivery"],
        decimals=0,
    )
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(
        align="right",
        columns=["mean_economic_burden_delivery", "median_economic_burden_delivery"],
    )
    .tab_source_note(
        "Mean = Σ(value × weight) ÷ Σ(weight). Median = first value at or above 50% cumulative weight.",
    )
)

_economic_burden_delivery_gt
```

```{python}
#| label: change in marginal cost before vs after HP adoption

bat_12_df = bat_12.collect()
bat_34_df = bat_34.collect()

up00_no_hp = bat_12_df.filter(~pl.col(POSTPROCESS_GROUP_HAS_HP))
up02_hp = bat_34_df.filter(pl.col("bldg_id").is_in(metadata_up_02_hp_df["bldg_id"]))

up00_no_hp_up02_hp = up00_no_hp.join(up02_hp, on="bldg_id", how="inner")

```

```{python}
#| label: economic-burden-delivery-matched-cohort-gt

_cohort_matched = up00_no_hp_up02_hp
_EBD_BASELINE = "economic_burden_delivery"  # run 1+2; right-side duplicate is economic_burden_delivery_right

_matched_ebd_stats_df = pl.DataFrame([{
    "group": "bldg_id with no HP in up00, but with HP in up02",
    "mean_economic_burden_delivery": _w_mean_ebd(_cohort_matched, _EBD_BASELINE),
    "median_economic_burden_delivery": _w_median_ebd(_cohort_matched, _EBD_BASELINE),
}]).with_columns(
    pl.col("mean_economic_burden_delivery").fill_nan(None),
    pl.col("median_economic_burden_delivery").fill_nan(None),
)

_economic_burden_delivery_matched_gt = (
    GT(_matched_ebd_stats_df, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Economic burden (delivery) — mean and median (matched cohort)",
        subtitle=(
            "Single row: all bldg_id in the inner join of baseline (run 1+2, no HP) and HP run (3+4). "
            "BAT economic_burden_delivery from run 1+2; weighted with ResStock weight."
        ),
    )
    .cols_label(
        mean_economic_burden_delivery="Mean",
        median_economic_burden_delivery="Median",
    )
    .fmt_currency(
        columns=["mean_economic_burden_delivery", "median_economic_burden_delivery"],
        decimals=0,
    )
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(
        align="right",
        columns=["mean_economic_burden_delivery", "median_economic_burden_delivery"],
    )
    .tab_source_note(
        "Mean = Σ(value × weight) ÷ Σ(weight). Median = first value at or above 50% cumulative weight.",
    )
)

_economic_burden_delivery_matched_gt
```

```{python}
#| label: ebd-residual-totals-and-group-pct-gt

# Union of the four heating subgroups (same OR as belonging to HP, ER, natgas, or oil/propane).
# Statewide totals and % of bldg_id use only this cohort — not other rows in bat_12_df.
_in_any_of_four_groups = (
    (pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "heat_pump")
    | (pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "electrical_resistance")
    | pl.col("heats_with_natgas")
    | pl.col("heats_with_oil")
    | pl.col("heats_with_propane")
)
_bat_12_four_groups_union = bat_12_df.filter(_in_any_of_four_groups)

_total_delivery_cos_statewide = delivery_cos_weighted_sum(_bat_12_four_groups_union)

_delivery_cos_statewide_df = pl.DataFrame([{
    "cohort": "Union of four heating groups (run 1+2 BAT)",
    "sum_ebd_plus_residual": _total_delivery_cos_statewide,
}]).with_columns(pl.col("sum_ebd_plus_residual").fill_nan(None))

_delivery_cos_statewide_gt = (
    GT(_delivery_cos_statewide_df, rowname_col="cohort")
    .tab_header(
        title="Σ marginal + residual — four-group union cohort",
        subtitle=(
            "Per building: economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery; "
            "Σ (combined × weight) only over bldg_id in at least one of: "
            "heat pump, electric resistance, natgas, oil/propane — not full bat_12_df."
        ),
    )
    .cols_label(
        sum_ebd_plus_residual="Σ (marginal cost + residual)",
    )
    .fmt_currency(columns=["sum_ebd_plus_residual"], decimals=0)
    .cols_align(align="right", columns=["sum_ebd_plus_residual"])
    .tab_source_note(
        "Cohort = OR of the four subgroup filters on bat_12_df. Same delivery COS definition as elsewhere. BAT run 1+2."
    )
)

_n_bat_rows = _bat_12_four_groups_union.height

_group_delivery_cos_share_rows: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    s = delivery_cos_weighted_sum(d)
    pct = (s / _total_delivery_cos_statewide * 100) if _total_delivery_cos_statewide else float("nan")
    pct_times_total = (
        (pct / 100) * _total_delivery_cos_statewide
        if _total_delivery_cos_statewide
        else float("nan")
    )
    pct_bldg_rows = (d.height / _n_bat_rows * 100) if _n_bat_rows else float("nan")
    total_delivery_revenue = _weighted_sum(d, "annual_bill_delivery")
    _group_delivery_cos_share_rows.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "sum_ebd_plus_residual": s,
        "pct_of_statewide": pct,
        "pct_times_statewide_sum": pct_times_total,
        "pct_bldg_id_rows": pct_bldg_rows,
        "total_delivery_revenue": total_delivery_revenue,
    })

_group_delivery_cos_share_df = (
    pl.DataFrame(_group_delivery_cos_share_rows)
    .select("group", "sum_ebd_plus_residual", "pct_of_statewide")
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("sum_ebd_plus_residual").fill_nan(None),
        pl.col("pct_of_statewide").fill_nan(None),
    )
)

_pct_x_statewide_df = (
    pl.DataFrame(_group_delivery_cos_share_rows)
    .select(
        "group",
        "pct_bldg_id_rows",
        "total_delivery_revenue",
        "pct_of_statewide",
        "pct_times_statewide_sum",
    )
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("pct_bldg_id_rows").fill_nan(None),
        pl.col("total_delivery_revenue").fill_nan(None),
        pl.col("pct_of_statewide").fill_nan(None),
        pl.col("pct_times_statewide_sum").fill_nan(None),
    )
)

_group_delivery_cos_share_gt = (
    GT(_group_delivery_cos_share_df, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Σ (EBD + residual) by subgroup — $ and % of statewide total",
        subtitle=(
            "Numerator: subgroup Σ ((economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery) × weight). "
            "Denominator: statewide combined Σ above. Subgroups can overlap; shares need not sum to 100%."
        ),
    )
    .cols_label(
        sum_ebd_plus_residual="Σ (EBD + residual)",
        pct_of_statewide="% of statewide Σ",
    )
    .fmt_currency(columns="sum_ebd_plus_residual", decimals=0)
    .fmt_number(columns="pct_of_statewide", decimals=1, pattern="{x}%")
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(align="right", columns=["sum_ebd_plus_residual", "pct_of_statewide"])
    .tab_source_note(
        f"Denominator Σ (EBD + residual): {_total_delivery_cos_statewide:,.0f} $/yr over four-group union only (weighted).",
    )
)

_pct_x_statewide_gt = (
    GT(_pct_x_statewide_df, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Subgroup sample share, delivery revenue, and equiproportional check",
        subtitle=(
            f"% of bldg_id: group row count ÷ four-group union row count ({_n_bat_rows:,}). "
            f"Revenue: Σ (annual_bill_delivery × weight) per group. "
            f"Right columns: COS % of union-cohort Σ ({_total_delivery_cos_statewide:,.0f} $/yr) and (%÷100)×that Σ."
        ),
    )
    .cols_label(
        pct_bldg_id_rows="percent of population",
        total_delivery_revenue="current total delivery revenue",
        pct_of_statewide="percent of statewide marginal cost",
        pct_times_statewide_sum="equiproportional revenue requirement",
    )
    .fmt_number(columns=["pct_bldg_id_rows", "pct_of_statewide"], decimals=1, pattern="{x}%")
    .fmt_currency(columns=["total_delivery_revenue", "pct_times_statewide_sum"], decimals=0)
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(
        align="right",
        columns=[
            "pct_bldg_id_rows",
            "total_delivery_revenue",
            "pct_of_statewide",
            "pct_times_statewide_sum",
        ],
    )
    .tab_source_note(
        f"Union-cohort Σ (marginal+residual) used as statewide denominator: {_total_delivery_cos_statewide:,.0f} $/yr "
        f"(only bldg_id in one of the four heating groups; n={_n_bat_rows:,} rows). "
        "Delivery revenue = annual_bill_delivery (BAT), weighted.",
    )
)

print("\nSubgroup: % of sample bldg_id, Σ delivery revenue, COS % and equiproportional $\n")
print(_pct_x_statewide_df)

_delivery_cos_statewide_gt
_group_delivery_cos_share_gt
_pct_x_statewide_gt
```
